patches.summary: Hand-built local-SQLite source adapter (snapshot + FTS5 + typed queries) replacing the HTTP client.
patches.reason: Data source is Chrome's local History DB, not an HTTP API — the generator has no local-datastore path yet.
Transcendence features over the local store; not generatable from a spec.

patches.summary: Cross-device (origin) partitioning via visit_source/originator_cache_guid + --device filter + devices command.
patches.reason: Browser history includes synced other-device activity; surfaced as a first-class dimension.
